channel.title: Youtube on PostDoc Problems
channel.description: Recent content in Youtube on PostDoc Problems

item.title: Tom Scott
item.description: Tom Scott stopped making weekly videos today after 10 years. When I first discovered his channel, I binged through all of his videos - at least the ones about travel, and science, and stuff. His departure feels significant. Signaling me to change as well, shed some of my old skin.

item.title: Zugzwang
item.description:
Zugzwang

(n.) a situation in which the obligation to make a move in one’s turn is a serious, often decisive, disadvantage, often in the final years of grad school.

Zugzywangy.

I don’t understand music and yet I like to listen to it, same goes with girls. I recently came across this video on youtube where the guy describes chess games and it’s fun to watch even without knowing anything about chess.
